subcodes.first_line: The Days of the Divine Manifestations are, in one station, referred to as the Day of God; yet these Days are specifically consecrated in all the Books to the revelation of the Unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام مظاهر الهی در مقامی بیوم الله مذکور ولکن این ایام در جمیع کتب مخصوصست بظهور غیب
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
